title: Salt Security
description: Salt Security protects the agentic infrastructure powering modern enterprises. Our Agentic Security Graph maps every AI agent, MCP server, and API connection, then detects and stops attacks across the action layer before damage hits.

items: Enforce role- & task-based access policies across agent populations & their tool access.
Align control evidence with frameworks like EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, & ISO/IEC 42001.
